zh.lifeSummary: 當Aleydis van Altena於大約1167年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德分時，她的父親Willem van Altena59歲，母親Alida van der Louw44歲。她於1195年與Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年1月15日在荷蘭-拉藍德丹 哈格享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aleydis van Altena于大约1167年出生在荷兰-拉藍德分时，她的父亲Willem van Altena59岁，母亲Alida van der Louw44岁。她于1195年与Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年1月15日在荷兰-拉藍德丹 哈格享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Altena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch and North German: habitational name from any of several places and houses so named. For a long time the placename has been explained as al te na ‘too close’, referring to its location nearby another object. Possibly this associative explanation has been applied for some Altena places indeed, but in North Brabant the toponym Land of Altena, with the castle of the noblemen of Altena, seems to be adopted from an old river name Huolthena (996), which probably means olten a ‘old a’, a being a general noun for ‘waterway’.

en.lifeSummary: When Aleydis van Altena was born about 1167, in Schoonhoven, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Willem van Altena, was 59 and her mother, Alida van der Louw, was 44. She married Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten in 1195. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 15 January 1224, in The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aleydis van Altena est née environ 1167, à Schoonhoven, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Willem van Altena, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Alida van der Louw, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten en 1195. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 janvier 1224, à La Haye, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aleydis van Altena um 1167 in Schoonhoven, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Willem van Altena 59 und ihre Mutter Alida van der Louw 44. Sie hat 1195 Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Januar 1224 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Den Haag, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aleydis van Altena è nata il circa 1167 nel Schoonhoven, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Willem van Altena, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Alida van der Louw, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten nel 1195. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 gennaio 1224, nel Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aleydis van Altenaが約1167年にオランダズイド-hオランドスチオオンhオベンで生まれた時，父Willem van Altenaは59歳，母Alida van der Louwは44歳であった。1195年にJan Dirksz Persijn van Puttenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年1月15日にオランダズイド-hオランドデン ハアグで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aleydis van Altena(이)가 대략 1167년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 슈호븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Willem van Altena(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alida van der Louw(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1195년 Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 1월 15일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 든 하아그에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aleydis van Altena nasceu aproximadamente 1167, em Schoonhoven, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Willem van Altena, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Alida van der Louw, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten em 1195. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1224, em Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 58 anos.

ro.Den Haag, ZH Netherlands: Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aleydis van Altena родилась около 1167 г. в местности щуновен, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Willem van Altena было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Alida van der Louw, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten в 1195 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 января 1224 г. в местности ден хааг, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aleydis van Altena nació aproximadamente 1167, en Schoonhoven, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Willem van Altena, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Alida van der Louw, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten en 1195. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de enero de 1224, en Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 58 años.
